params.description:
On Aug 21, 1997, Henri Rousseau created this exotic piece.

In this painting, a dark-skinned gypsy in a colorful costume was sleeping under the moonlight. She remained sleeping even when a dangerous lion approached. The painting is tranquil and poetic. This painting features sharp contours, bright colors, and beautiful lines. the color tones and composition have been carefully designed to create a harmonious and beautiful piece.
